shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default card lift. Separates without impressing.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs. Pairs with the dark-green overlay.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Elements entering the viewport: modals, dropdowns, toasts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one orange action on the screen. CTAs, deposit requests, quote sends.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d96f0a; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b85d08; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(217,111,10,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d96f0a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Never competes with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #5a6070; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #dedad4; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f2ed; color: #1a1a1a; border-color: #c8c4be; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3a6349; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: All form fields. Stroke-bordered, focus shifts to primary green.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #dedad4; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5a6070; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3a6349; border-width: 2px; padding: 9px 13px; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f5f2ed; color: #5a6070; border-color: #dedad4; opacity: 0.6; }

components.name: Status Chip — Scheduled
components.description: Job status indicator. Background is a 10% tint of the semantic color.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-chip-scheduled { background: #eaf3ed; color: #3a6349; } .ds-chip-complete { background: #e8f5ee; color: #3d9e6a; } .ds-chip-in-progress { background: #fdf0e6; color: #d96f0a; } .ds-chip-deposit-paid { background: #e8f5ee; color: #3d9e6a; } .ds-chip-estimate-sent { background: #f0f0f2; color: #5a6070; } .ds-chip-archived { background: #f5f2ed; color: #5a6070; }

components.name: Job List Item
components.description: The primary list unit on the dashboard. Full-width row, not a card grid.
components.html:
Chad Peterson — 312 Maple StScheduled
Apr 29$3,400
components.css: .ds-job-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 14px 16px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dedad4; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-job-item:hover { border-color: #3a6349; } .ds-job-main { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-job-name { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-job-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-job-date { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5a6070; } .ds-job-price { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-chip-scheduled { background: #eaf3ed; color: #3a6349; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Desktop sidebar navigation on Old Growth Canopy background.
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: #1f3d2c; padding: 16px 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-active { background: #d96f0a; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-nav-active:hover { color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Branded dark-green overlay. No blur. No accent stripe.
components.html:
Add New Job

Enter the client address to pull satellite imagery and begin the estimate.
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(31,61,44,0.75); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px; z-index: 50; } .ds-modal-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; max-width: 28rem; width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } .ds-modal-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0 0 8px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-modal-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #5a6070; margin: 0 0 20px; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-modal-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary { background: #d96f0a; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #5a6070; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #dedad4; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview:
EaveHQ is built for people who use their phone between jobs, in truck cabs, in full sun. The design system earns trust through precision, not polish. Every element has a job. Every interaction feels mechanical and deliberate.

The palette is drawn from the job site itself: forest greens anchored in the Pacific Northwest timber industry, warm stone surfaces that read clearly under sunlight, ember copper reserved for live data and the one tap that matters. Nothing is decorative.

This system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS blue-gray interfaces, glassmorphism and blurred overlays used decoratively, dashboard hero-metric templates, identical card grids, dark-mode-by-default for its own sake, and anything that requires reading a tooltip to understand what a button does.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first: every interactive target is reachable one-handed
Warm and precise: stone surfaces, forest greens, no clinical white
Earned density: power users run 15 active jobs; the layout accommodates real data
Accent scarcity: ember copper appears on CTAs and live numbers only
Functional typography: Syne for authority, DM Sans for readability, Geist Mono for numbers

rules.name: The Ember Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Ember Copper appears on the one action that matters on any given screen. Never apply it to two interactive elements side-by-side. If it reads like decoration, it has failed.

rules.name: The Warm Canvas Rule
rules.body: Page backgrounds use Morning Limestone, not white. Cards use Clean Slate. This one-step tonal shift creates depth without shadow and keeps the interface from reading as sterile.

rules.name: The Instrument Rule
rules.body: Any number that represents money, measurement, or time uses Geist Mono. Body text that happens to contain a digit does not.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only in response to layer level (card vs. modal) or interactive hover state. No element uses a shadow to look important.

rules.name: The No-Blur Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur is prohibited on modal and overlay backgrounds. Blurred overlays are decoration. The dark green semi-transparent backdrop is EaveHQ's modal signature.

dos: Do use Ember Copper on the single most important action per screen.
Do use Geist Mono for all prices, totals, deposit amounts, and timestamps older than 7 days.
Do use Morning Limestone as the page background and Clean Slate for card surfaces.
Do vary spacing deliberately: 8px tight, 16px content, 24-32px section separation.
Do use Old Growth Canopy as the sidebar shell.
Do cap body line length at 65-75ch on all prose content.
Do use the dark panel treatment (rgba(15,25,40,0.92)) for map-overlay elements in the Estimator only.
donts: Don't use backdrop-filter: blur anywhere outside the Estimator.
Don't use glassmorphism: no blurred glass cards, no frosted panels outside map context.
Don't use generic SaaS blue-gray interfaces.
Don't use hero-metric dashboard templates: big number, small label, gradient accent.
Don't place an accent-colored horizontal stripe at the top of modal cards.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't apply Ember Copper to two interactive elements on the same screen.
Don't use raw hex or Tailwind color utilities; reference var(--color-*) tokens.
